title: Wrong or missing items
content: Stores try their best to fulfill every order, but sometimes they must remove an out-of-stock item from your order. Please check your final receipt to see if the missing item(s) were already taken off. If you still have an issue, send us the details using the form below about your missing or incorrect items. Please complete this form within 48 hours to be eligible for a refund. Requests outside of this time window will not be eligible for a refund. We'll review and make adjustments as necessary.

title: Missing items
content: If there were item(s) missing from the order you received, please let us know here. While we will not be able to replace the item(s), you may be eligible for a refund or credit. When items are missing, we refund the customer the sales price of the item (including tax/VAT) at the time of the order. If an entire order is incorrect, the customer is refunded for the sales price of the entire order (including tax/VAT) and the delivery fee.

title: My order is wrong
content: Please contact us within 48 hours to get the best-possible support experience. After this time-frame, we may be unable to provide a refund or other resolution. Photos help us understand what happened. Please attach a photo of the items you received and/or the receipt of the wrong order (check the delivery bag for a receipt).

title: Order never arrived
content: If you selected the delivery option Leave at door, please check your door to make sure your order has not already arrived. If a delivery person made a reasonable effort to contact you when arriving at your requested location, you may not be eligible for a refund.

title: My order never arrived
content: If a delivery person made a reasonable effort to contact you after arriving at your delivery address, you may not be eligible for a refund. If your order shows as delivered but you did not receive it, report the issue through the app within 48 hours. Uber will investigate using GPS data and delivery confirmation photos.

title: My order is taking longer than expected
content: Merchants and delivery people do their best to deliver your food within the estimated delivery time, but external factors may cause delays (for example, if the merchant is busier than normal, your order is a large order, there's unexpected traffic, or bad weather conditions). If your order is taking longer than expected, check your delivery person's ETA in the app or contact them directly for details. Note: If your delivery person arrived, attempted to contact you, and couldn't deliver the order, you are charged for the order.

title: Late delivery compensation
content: For orders arriving 20+ minutes past the estimated delivery time range, Uber may provide a refund or issue Uber credits depending on the delay when you contact the support team. Please be sure to contact us within 48 hours for the best possible support experience. After this timeframe, we may be unable to provide a refund or other resolution. If the order is past the Latest Arrival By time, you can cancel your order and receive a refund, or receive Uber Cash worth 20% of your order price if you keep the order.

title: What is the Uber Eats cancellation policy
content: You are guaranteed a free cancellation up until the merchant has accepted your order. Cancellations made after the merchant has accepted may incur charges. A pop up appears confirming you'd like to cancel and alerts you to any potential charges. From the bottom menu bar, select the Account icon. Select the cancelled order.

title: I was charged for cancelling my order
content: Cancellations may happen for a variety of reasons. We can only guarantee a refund if you cancel before the store has accepted your order. We may be able to offer adjustments on orders that are canceled due to situations like unexpected long wait times, or store-initiated cancellations. Also, please be sure to contact us within 48 hours of a cancellation so we can provide the best possible support experience. Beyond that time frame, we may be unable to provide a refund or other resolution.

title: I was charged for cancellation
content: The delivery person might cancel the delivery if they can't find or reach you. If a delivery person wasn't able to reach you but made a reasonable effort to contact you after arriving at your requested location, you may not be eligible for a refund. Please note: If a customer cancels an order, we can only guarantee a refund if the order is canceled before the store accepts it. Before the delivery partner picks up your order, you will be charged the total order amount minus the delivery fee. After the delivery partner picks up your order, the full order amount will be charged.

title: My order was canceled FAQ
content: It's possible that a delivery person might cancel the delivery if they're unable to find or reach you. When arriving at your delivery address, they're prompted to contact you so keep your phone nearby when you're expecting a delivery. If a delivery person made a reasonable effort to contact you after arriving at your delivery address, you may not be eligible for a refund.

title: Cancel my order
content: The cancellation fee will be charged with the delivery status. Please contact our Support Center through the Chat with us below on the Cancel my Order help page. To cancel your order because of an incorrect delivery address, contact your delivery partner directly in the Uber Eats app. Once a promotion code has been applied to an order, we are unable to return the promotion code to the account or refund the promotional amount, even if the order is canceled or not completed.

title: Managing refunds for missing or incorrect orders
content: When items are missing, we'll refund the customer the sales price of the item (including tax/VAT) at the time of the order. If an entire order is incorrect, the customer is refunded for the sales price of the entire order (including tax/VAT) and the delivery fee. Total refunds (less delivery fees) are deducted directly from restaurant payouts. Every order error adjustment is evaluated on a case-by-case basis. Multiple factors are considered and we have measures in place to protect against potentially fraudulent customer or delivery partner reports.

title: Order errors and refund policy
content: Most orders placed on Uber Eats go off without a hitch. A small portion of orders have errors reported by the customer, the delivery person, or the merchant. Order error adjustments are the eligible customer refund costs that are deducted from stores' payouts for circumstances within merchants' control, and after fraud checks. We track customer refund history and block customers who abuse our refund policy from submitting claims. We require photos to be submitted in many cases as evidence before making a refund decision. We enforce minimum delivery person satisfaction ratings from both customers and merchants. Delivery people who have a significant number of missing item reports associated with their deliveries are automatically flagged in our systems.

title: How to get a refund on Uber Eats
content: Uber Eats offers refunds to customers who are not satisfied with their orders. You can contact Uber Eats customer service through the app. Whether you want to cancel an order or file a complaint about the order you received, use the Uber Eats app or website. For missing or incorrect orders, you need to report the problem to Uber Eats within 48 hours to get your money back. Besides immediate cancellations, you may get a refund from Uber Eats for mistakes made by the restaurant or delivery staff. Uber may use AI-photo verification to process refunds instantly to your original payment method or as Uber Cash.

title: How to contact support
content: We provide support via our in-app platform which can be accessed anytime by tapping HELP in the app. You can contact support 24/7 via any of the articles below. Diamond users will have access to our premium support line. The fastest way to reach support is through the in-app help section. You can also reach support through the Uber Eats website at help.uber.com.

title: What is Uber Eats
content: Uber Eats is our food delivery platform that makes getting great food from your favorite local restaurants as easy as requesting a ride. The Uber Eats app connects you with a broad range of local restaurants and food, so you can order from the full menus of your local favorites whenever you want.

title: How to place an order on Uber Eats
content: To place an order: Sign in (or create an account) and set your delivery address. Choose the restaurant you want to order from. Select your items and tap Add to Cart. To place your order, select View cart or Checkout. Review your order and tap Place Order. When using for business purposes, switch to your business profile before completing your order. Track your order's progress. If using the app, ensure your volume is on to hear when your order arrives.

title: How do I apply a promo code
content: Some restaurant promos are automatically added to your account and will apply to your order before any other promos. You may only use one promo per order. To apply a promo code: go to checkout, tap Add promo code in the Payment section, paste your code, and tap Apply. Store promos will automatically be applied first, with the highest value account promo added next.

title: How do promo codes work
content: Store promos will automatically be applied first, with the highest value account promo added next. You can select a preferred promo code to apply to a specific order, or none to save them for future orders. Some promos only apply to specific cities, states, countries, etc. Promos can't be combined - only one promo code can be applied to an order and if it's for a specific amount, any unused amount does not roll over to another order. Some promos may only apply for certain user types; for example, first-time users. Rides promos do not apply to delivery or pickup orders.

title: Uber One membership benefits
content: Uber One is a subscription that auto-renews at $9.99/month or $99.99/year. Members get $0 Delivery Fee on standard delivery within at least 3 miles and discounted Service Fee from participating stores when meeting order minimums. Members earn Uber One credits after completion of eligible rides, redeemable on eligible eats and rides orders. You can cancel your membership at any time in the Uber One section of the Uber app by selecting Manage Membership, then End Membership. If you cancel less than 24 hours before your next renewal day, you may see a charge that will be automatically refunded. Student membership available at $4.99/month.

title: Uber One cancellation and refund
content: No penalties or fees will be incurred even if the contract is canceled during the contract period. If you cancel UberOne within 30 days and have not used any UberOne benefits, you will receive a full refund. When you cancel Uber One, you can still access your benefits until the end of the current billing period.

title: Eats Pass cancellation and refund
content: You can cancel Eats Pass at any time up to 24 hours before your next scheduled payment. Otherwise, you'll be charged for the next cycle. Open the Uber Eats app. Tap the profile icon on the bottom menu bar to see your account. Tap Eats Pass to open your Eats Pass hub. In the hub, tap Manage membership. Tap End membership and follow the on-screen instructions. When you cancel Eats Pass, you can still access your benefits until the end of the current billing period.

title: Delayed order arrival
content: Estimated time of delivery may change based on traffic and order progress. Latest arrival by time is confirmed when your order is accepted by the restaurant. If the delivery partner has not yet arrived nearby after this time, please contact our support team. If the restaurant has not yet accepted your order, you can cancel it via the app without any cancellation fees. If you need to cancel after the restaurant has accepted your order, please contact our support team. Before the delivery partner picks up your order, you will be charged the total order amount minus the delivery fee. After the delivery partner picks up your order, the full order amount will be charged.

title: Uber Eats delivery fees and pricing
content: Delivery fees vary based on distance, demand, and restaurant. Uber One members enjoy $0 delivery fees on eligible orders over minimum amounts. Small order fees may apply to orders below a certain dollar amount. Service fees are separate from delivery fees and help cover operational costs. Additional and optional fees may be charged for Priority Delivery and Long Range Delivery. Tips go directly to the delivery person and are not included in the delivery fee.

title: Uber Eats return and refund policy
content: For food orders, if an order is incorrect, missing items, or arrives damaged, you generally have 48 hours to report the issue through the Help section of the app. Uber Eats may use AI-photo verification to process refunds instantly to your original payment method or as Uber Cash. For non-perishable retail items ordered via Uber Eats, a Return from Door service is available in select markets where a courier picks up the return. Uber One members may have the return fee waived.

title: What if we forgot an item for an order
content: Please contact your delivery person to coordinate a return to the restaurant. You can reach out to them in the Order history section of the Uber Eats Orders by selecting the clock icon on your screen. If the order has been delivered or the delivery person cannot go back to the restaurant, contact Uber support. We'll reach out to the customer to confirm they still want the missing item. If they don't want the missing item, we'll adjust the total sale of the order and refund the customer for the missing item.

title: Delivery by merchant staff late delivery
content: When stores use their own delivery staff, real-time tracking of the delivery staff may not be available on the Uber Eats app. However, you can still monitor the app for updates on your order status. If you have questions regarding your delivery, feel free to contact the store directly using the Call store button on the order tracking page. For orders arriving 20+ minutes past the estimated delivery time range, we may provide a refund or issue Uber credits depending on the delay when you contact our support team. Please be sure to contact us within 48 hours.

title: Food quality and safety issues
content: If you received food that was cold, stale, spoiled, or otherwise of poor quality from Uber Eats, you can report the issue through the app. Go to Orders, select the affected order, tap Help, and choose Food quality issue. Describe the problem and include photos if possible. Uber Eats will review your report and may issue a refund or credit depending on the severity of the issue. For food safety concerns such as finding foreign objects or experiencing illness, contact support immediately. Customer food quality complaints including food taste or integrity are tracked as order errors.

title: Damaged or spilled order
content: If your Uber Eats order arrived damaged or spilled, report it through the app immediately. Go to Orders, select the affected order, tap Help, and choose Order arrived damaged. Include photos of the damage for faster processing. Uber Eats will evaluate the extent of the damage and issue an appropriate refund or credit. If only part of the order was damaged, you may receive a partial refund. For completely unusable orders, a full refund is typically provided. Please report within 48 hours.

title: How to track your delivery
content: Once your Uber Eats order is placed, you can track it in real time through the app. The tracking screen shows the order status: confirmed, being prepared, driver assigned, driver picking up, and on the way. You can see the driver's location on the map and the estimated arrival time. If the driver is having trouble finding your location, you can contact them directly through the app via chat or call.

title: Delivery instructions and notes
content: You can add delivery instructions to help your driver find your location. During checkout, tap Add delivery instructions to include details like gate codes, building numbers, floor information, or specific drop-off preferences. You can choose delivery options: Meet at door, Leave at door, or Meet outside. Adding clear instructions reduces delivery issues.

title: No-contact delivery option
content: Uber Eats offers a no-contact delivery option for added safety. Select Leave at door as your delivery preference during checkout. The driver will place your order at your door, take a photo as confirmation, and notify you. You will receive the photo in the app. This option is available for most orders except those requiring age verification such as alcohol deliveries.

title: Tipping your delivery driver
content: You can tip your Uber Eats delivery driver before or after delivery. A tip suggestion appears during checkout and you can adjust the amount. After delivery, you have up to 1 hour to add or modify your tip. Tips go directly to the driver and are not shared with Uber. Tipping is optional but appreciated by drivers.

title: Scheduled orders
content: Uber Eats allows you to schedule orders in advance. You can schedule an order up to 7 days ahead. During checkout, tap Schedule for later and select your preferred delivery date and time window. Scheduled orders are sent to the restaurant at the appropriate time to ensure fresh preparation. You can modify or cancel a scheduled order before the restaurant starts preparing it.

title: Group orders
content: Group orders allow multiple people to add items to a single Uber Eats order. To start a group order, select a restaurant, tap Group Order, and share the link with friends or colleagues. Each person can browse the menu and add their own items. The order organizer reviews all items and places the final order. Payment can be split among participants or paid by the organizer.

title: Pickup orders
content: Uber Eats offers a pickup option where you can order food and pick it up yourself from the restaurant. Pickup orders have no delivery fee and often have reduced service fees. To place a pickup order, toggle the Pickup option at the top of the app. Select a restaurant, place your order, and arrive at the restaurant when notified that your order is ready.

title: Account security and login issues
content: To keep your Uber Eats account secure, use a strong unique password and enable two-factor authentication. If you suspect unauthorized access, change your password immediately and review your order history for unfamiliar transactions. If you are locked out of your account, use the Forgot password option on the login screen. You will receive a reset link via email or SMS. Chat support is available for sign-in issues.

title: How to update payment method
content: To update your payment method on Uber Eats, open the app and go to Account, then Payment. You can add a new credit card, debit card, or link a PayPal account. Uber Eats accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay. You can set a default payment method that will be used for all future orders.

title: How ratings work
content: After each delivery, you can rate your experience on Uber Eats. You can rate both the restaurant food quality and the delivery driver separately. Ratings are on a scale of 1 to 5 stars. Your ratings help Uber Eats improve service quality. Ratings are anonymous and restaurants and drivers cannot see who rated them. Consistent low ratings may affect a restaurant's visibility on the platform.

title: Uber Eats for Business
content: Uber Eats for Business allows companies to set up meal programs for employees. Administrators can set spending limits, restrict restaurant choices, and manage expensing. Employees order through their regular Uber Eats app using their business profile. Companies are billed centrally. Organizations earn $20 in Uber for Business credits for every $200 spent on valid programs.

title: Alcohol delivery policies
content: Uber Eats delivers alcohol in select regions where permitted by local laws. Alcohol orders require ID verification upon delivery. The recipient must be of legal drinking age and present a valid government-issued photo ID. The driver will verify your ID before handing over the order. If ID cannot be verified, the alcohol portion of the order will be returned and refunded.

title: Uber Eats gift cards
content: Uber Eats gift cards can be purchased online or at retail locations starting at $15. To redeem a gift card, go to Account, then Payment, and select Add Uber Cash. Enter the gift card code to add the balance to your Uber Cash. Uber Cash can be used for Uber Eats orders and Uber rides. Gift card balances do not expire. If your order total exceeds your Uber Cash balance, the remaining amount is charged to your default payment method.

title: Reporting a safety concern
content: If you experience a safety concern during an Uber Eats delivery, report it immediately through the app. Go to Help and select I have a safety concern. For emergencies, use the in-app emergency button to contact local authorities directly. Safety reports are reviewed by Uber's dedicated safety team. You can report concerns about driver behavior, food tampering, or any threatening situations.

title: Uber Eats availability and delivery zones
content: Uber Eats is available in over 6,000 cities worldwide across more than 45 countries. Each restaurant has a defined delivery zone based on distance and delivery time. Restaurants may not appear in your search if you are outside their delivery zone. You can check availability by entering your address in the app.

title: Service fees explained
content: Uber Eats charges a service fee on each order to help cover operational costs including customer support, platform maintenance, and insurance. The service fee is typically a percentage of the order subtotal, usually between 10-15%. Uber One members receive reduced service fees. Small order fees may apply separately for orders below a minimum amount. All fees are displayed during checkout before you place your order.

title: Tax and regulatory fees
content: Uber Eats orders include applicable taxes and regulatory fees based on your location. These are calculated and displayed at checkout. Tax rates vary by jurisdiction. Some cities or regions impose additional regulatory fees on food delivery services. These fees are passed through to the customer and are shown as a separate line item on your receipt.

title: Unauthorized charge
content: If you see an unauthorized charge from Uber Eats on your payment method, contact Uber Eats support immediately. Provide details including the charge amount, date, and payment method. Uber will investigate the charge and issue a refund if it was unauthorized. You should also change your password and review your account security settings.

title: Order receipt and expense tracking
content: A digital receipt is generated for every Uber Eats order. You can find receipts in your order history by tapping on any past order. Receipts include itemized costs, fees, taxes, tips, and any promotions applied. You can email receipts to yourself for expense tracking. For business orders, receipts can be automatically forwarded to expense management systems.

title: Allergies and dietary restrictions
content: Uber Eats recommends that customers with food allergies or dietary restrictions contact the restaurant directly before ordering. Some restaurants list allergen information on their menu items in the app. You can add special instructions to your order to request allergen accommodations, but Uber Eats cannot guarantee that restaurants will follow these requests. For severe allergies, call the restaurant before placing your order.

title: Referral program
content: Uber Eats offers a referral program where you can earn credits by inviting friends. Go to Account and find your unique referral code. Share the code with friends. When a new user signs up using your referral code and places their first order, both of you may receive Uber Eats credit. Referral credit amounts and terms vary by region.

title: Data privacy
content: Uber Eats collects data to provide and improve its services, including your order history, location data, and payment information. You can review Uber's privacy policy for full details. You can request a copy of your personal data through the app under Privacy Settings. You can also request deletion of your data, which will result in account closure. Uber complies with applicable privacy regulations including GDPR and CCPA.

title: How Uber Eats selects your delivery driver
content: Uber Eats uses an algorithm to assign delivery drivers based on proximity to the restaurant, estimated delivery time, driver ratings, and current demand. The system aims to minimize delivery time while balancing driver availability. In some cases, your order may be batched with another delivery if both orders are going in the same direction.

title: Saved addresses and locations
content: You can save multiple delivery addresses in your Uber Eats account. Go to Account, then Saved Places to add home, work, and other frequently used addresses. You can switch between saved addresses when placing an order. Each address can have its own delivery instructions.

title: Restaurant search and filters
content: You can search for specific restaurants, cuisines, or dishes on Uber Eats using the search bar. Filters allow you to narrow results by cuisine type, dietary preferences (vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free), price range, delivery time, rating, and promotions. The home screen shows curated categories and personalized recommendations based on your order history.

title: Uber Eats grocery delivery
content: In addition to restaurant food, Uber Eats also delivers groceries and convenience items in select areas. Browse the Grocery section in the app to find available stores. Grocery orders may have different delivery fees and service fees than restaurant orders. Items may be substituted if out of stock, and you can set substitution preferences.

title: Managing notifications
content: You can customize Uber Eats notifications in the app settings. Choose which alerts you want to receive, including order updates, promotional offers, delivery status, and account activity. Push notifications for order status are recommended to stay informed about your delivery.

title: Accessibility features
content: Uber Eats is committed to accessibility. The app supports screen readers and large text options. If you require special accommodations for delivery such as the driver coming to your door for mobility reasons, add this information in your delivery instructions. Contact support if you experience any accessibility barriers.

title: Reordering a previous meal
content: To quickly reorder a previous meal on Uber Eats, go to Orders and find the past order you want to repeat. Tap Reorder and the same items will be added to your cart. You can modify the order before placing it. If any items are no longer available, the app will notify you. Reordering uses the current menu prices.

title: Uber Eats customer support hours
content: Uber Eats customer support is available 24/7 through the in-app help center. Live chat support is available during extended hours. For urgent issues related to active deliveries, support is prioritized. Uber One members receive priority support with typically shorter wait times. You can also reach Uber Eats support by phone at 800-253-6882.
